one_time_description: Partnership Income of $1,853,031 representing a significant increase from prior year $20,173 - likely related to new joint venture or partnership activity
economic_notes: Nation operates multiple business enterprises through Seyem Qwantlen group including construction, development, land development, resources, ventures, hospitality, and harbour authority. Three joint ventures: Seyem Qwantlen Construction/Milestone Environmental Contracting West (51%), Jackson Ridge Project (50%), Seyem Qwantlen/Matcon Civil Joint Venture (51%).
notes: Complex consolidation with 16 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 3 proportionately consolidated joint ventures. Total government transfers estimated as ISC ($2,294,354) + ISC revenue deferred ($1,175,316) + Grants and other government funding ($13,793,171) = $17,262,841. Restricted cash estimated as trust funds ($172,100) + replacement reserve ($121,674). Current liabilities estimated as accounts payable ($4,017,648) + due to related parties ($1,250,319) + deferred revenue current portion (estimated) + bank indebtedness ($0) = $7,390,902 approximation using AP + related parties + deferred revenue. Remuneration schedule not visible in provided pages. Large jump in revenue from $16.4M to $34.2M primarily driven by grants/government funding increase from $3.5M to $13.8M and contracting services from $5.3M to $9.7M. Accumulated remeasurement gains of $2,888,901 included in accumulated surplus.
